error_signature: Could not connect with these settings
title: Connection issue with Apple CalDAV settings
symptom: When attempting to connect to Apple CalDAV, n8n returns 'Could not connect with these settings'. This occurs despite using the correct server URL and credentials.
applies_when: Configured with Apple ID and app password
not_this_if: No entries in the calendar for the specified date
root_cause: The error occurs due to incorrect configuration of the calendar ID or missing entries in the calendar for the specified date. The CalDAV node requires precise formatting and valid credentials to establish a connection.
fix_steps: Ensure the Server URL is set to 'https://caldav.icloud.com'
Set the Username to your Apple ID email and the Password to the app password created in your Apple account.
Set the 'Calendar Name or ID' field to 'Expression' and enter the correct path '/YOURUSERID/calendars/CALENDERID/' with the appropriate calendar ID.
Make sure there is at least one entry in your calendar for the date you are querying.
agent_instruction: Verify your CalDAV node settings and ensure the calendar ID and date entries are correct.
